limitations: This is not the full OMNIA engine.
This is a toy adversarial geometry experiment.
No universal adversarial robustness claim is made.
legacy_result.main_insight: A useful observer geometry should not only pass stability tests; it should also expose measurable collapse regions under adversarial pressure.
legacy_result.pass_condition: collapse_count >= 1 and resisted_count >= 1 and max_attack_score >= 0.80 and mean_attack_score >= 0.20
legacy_result.purpose: Test whether observer-family geometry exposes measurable failure boundaries under adversarial observer and sample constructions.

payload.normalization_note: Legacy result wrapped into canonical OMNIA-VALIDATION envelope. The original result file was not modified. Wrapper status is CHECK because this is format normalization, not scientific revalidation.
